issues.title: Private key file committed: serena.key
issues.description: The file "serena.key" appears to be a private key. Remove it and add to .gitignore.

issues.title: Unused dependency: dep
issues.description: The package "dep" is declared in package.json but never imported from source files under that package. If it's used only in package.json scripts or as a plugin, add it to the projscan allowlist via .projscanrc → disableRules.
